title: Supplements markdown-frontmatter list -> FactStore + supplements CLI
description: Add a markdown-frontmatter supplements list flattened into FactStore via reconcile (dedup-aware), plus `bober medical supplements add|list` subcommands. add reconciles a supplement (name + dose) into FactStore under the medical scope; list reads the supplements markdown-frontmatter file and prints each entry. Re-adding the same supplement+dose is a NOOP.

successCriteria.description: Running `npm run build` (tsc) compiles src/medical/supplements.ts and the extended medical CLI with zero TypeScript errors.
A vitest asserts runSupplementAdd reconciles a supplement into FactStore (scope medical, subject = supplement name, predicate carrying dose) via writeFact, and getActiveFacts returns the new fact.
A vitest asserts re-running runSupplementAdd with the same supplement and dose is a NOOP (reconcileFact exact-match), leaving the active-fact count at exactly 1.
A vitest asserts runSupplementList parses the supplements markdown-frontmatter file and writes each supplement name and dose to stdout (captured output contains the seeded entries).

nonGoals: Do not call any LLM or open any network connection -- reconcile runs deterministically with no FactJudge here.
Do not duplicate the lab ingest path -- supplements are FactStore facts, not HealthDataStore lab_results rows.
Do not add a new top-level command -- supplements is a subcommand of the existing `medical` command tree.
Do not require any field beyond the supplement name; dose is optional and defaults to an empty/unknown marker.
stopConditions: npm run build exits 0 and the supplements vitest suite passes.
A second runSupplementAdd with identical name+dose leaves the active-fact count at 1.
definitionOfDone: src/medical/supplements.ts parses a markdown-frontmatter supplements file (a list of { name, dose } entries) and flattens each into a FactInput (scope 'medical', subject = name, predicate = 'dose' or similar, value = dose) reconciled into FactStore via writeFact with an injected now and no judge. `bober medical supplements add <name> [--dose <d>]` reconciles one entry; `bober medical supplements list` prints every entry from the supplements markdown file. Re-adding an identical entry is a NOOP through reconcileFact exact-match, so the active-fact count does not grow.
assumptions: Supplements flatten into FactStore via reconcileFact/writeFact with exact-match NOOP/UPDATE dedup -- evidence: src/orchestrator/memory/reconcile.ts:51-101,148-154.
FactStore is the canonical structured store for meds/supplements (ADR-7) -- evidence: src/state/facts.ts:136 (FactStore) + memory MEMORY.md medical-team note.
Capture is zero-friction: only the supplement name is required, unknowns left null -- evidence: research-20260627-knowledge-platform-landscape.md section 3a UX rule 1 (line 129).
now is injected at the CLI boundary (no Date.now() inside the pure reconcile path) -- evidence: src/orchestrator/memory/reconcile.ts:49-55.
outOfScope: Supplement-interaction analysis / contraindication checks (sibling analysis spec).
generatorNotes: Reuse writeFact from src/orchestrator/memory/reconcile.ts and FactStore from src/state/facts.ts. Build the FactInput with scope 'medical', subject = supplement name, predicate = 'dose', value = dose string (default a placeholder like 'unspecified' when --dose is omitted, since FactSchema requires value min(1)), confidence 1, sourceRunId null, tValid and tCreated = injected now ISO. Do NOT pass a judge (deterministic path). For the markdown-frontmatter file, reuse the same frontmatter parse helper authored in Sprint 2 (lab-note) rather than adding a new dependency. Default the supplements file path under the vault/medical dir; accept an optional --file flag. Extract runSupplementAdd/runSupplementList cores for testability and register the subcommands under the existing `medical` command tree in src/cli/commands/medical.ts. Use an in-memory or temp-file FactStore in tests.
evaluatorNotes: Verify sc-4-3 actually inserts once then re-runs and asserts getActiveFacts(scope) length is 1 (NOOP, not a second row). Confirm no FactJudge / LLM / network is used (grep). Verify list reads from the markdown-frontmatter file and prints name+dose. Verify supplements is nested under `medical`. Verify build is green.
